summary.intent: Address 10 Codex code review findings on the `tags_input` component, implementing fixes with TDD, syncing the spec, and passing CI gates before pushing.
summary.outcome: All 10 findings resolved with 128 passing tests, 90.1% branch coverage, spec updated and validated, clippy clean, and the full xci-fast gate passed before commit and push.

repo: The established controlled-value convention uses on_props_changed/SetValue/SetProps events plus an on_value_change callback prop — mirroring the text_field implementation exactly.
Effects run with post-send context, so pending() reads the post-apply state and is safe and testable inside effect handlers.
Service::set_props(props) is the API for triggering prop resync in end-to-end tests.
The ars-components coverage gate enforces ≥90% on both line and branch coverage for production code.
on_props_changed is a trait method and must be fully qualified when called in test code.
SetValue/SetProps are parent-trusted syncs that legitimately bypass dedup invariants — they belong in explicit unit tests, not the proptest invariant generator.
Spec code blocks (§1.6/§1.7) are regenerated from source; prose sections (events, props, form behavior) are updated manually.

code.finding: Blur's disabled/readonly short-circuit branches were uncovered — needed targeted tests to reach the 90% branch gate.
value_change_effect None arm was an uncovered production branch requiring an explicit test.
props_output_changed per-field operands were uncovered branches — needed targeted prop-sync tests.
Canonical reference for the on_props_changed/SetValue/SetProps/on_value_change controlled-value machinery pattern used across input components.

workflow: TDD caught two real implementation bugs that were not in the original review: remove_plan removed by value (all duplicates) instead of by index, and the Tab arm was missing from on_tag_edit_keydown.
Draft per-thread PR reply messages before the CI gate finishes so they can be posted immediately after the push.
When branch coverage drops below the gate threshold after adding features, identify uncovered branches with a targeted grep before writing tests rather than guessing.

friction: Branch coverage fell just under 90% after the initial 10-fix implementation, requiring a second round of targeted branch tests before the gate passed.
on_props_changed test calls failed to compile because the method requires trait qualification — not obvious from the production call sites.
Two TDD test failures revealed real bugs (index-based removal and missing Tab arm) that required additional debugging and refactoring passes before tests could pass.
Three clippy warnings needed cleanup after the main implementation was complete.
open_items: Codex re-review pending — @codex review was queued to be triggered after the push with inline thread replies.
Caret-at-start parameter design (#6) was confirmed with the user as an agnostic-layer constraint; the exact API shape may need revisiting if the agnostic layer evolves.
SetValue/SetProps coverage is handled only via explicit unit tests; proptest generator intentionally excludes these parent-trusted syncs.
